title: The Haunting Disappearance of Maura Murray

scenes.text: A young woman vanished after a car crash, leaving no clues behind.
scenes.query2: lights fading on an empty road

scenes.text: It happened in Woodsville, New Hampshire.
On February 9, 2004, Maura Murray crashed her car and disappeared shortly after.
Despite numerous searches and investigations, her whereabouts remain unknown.
Many theories surround her disappearance, but none have been confirmed.
scenes.label: THEORIES ABOUND

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 Woodsville, USA - 2004. Maura Murray vanished after a car accident, leaving behind a mystery that endures. Follow for daily cold cases!
